author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (sched core + drm_sched):

- kernel/sched/core.md: covers kernel/sched/core.c (~11K lines, largest in kernel/sched/) — scheduler core: __schedule(preempt) central dispatch loop, struct rq per-CPU runqueue, struct sched_class vtable chain (CFS/RT/DEADLINE/IDLE/STOP), try_to_wake_up + select_task_rq + IPI-resched, voluntary preempt (cond_resched/schedule_timeout/io_schedule), involuntary preempt (preempt_schedule_irq), sched_setattr/sched_setaffinity per-task config UAPI, init_idle per-CPU IDLE thread, CPU hotplug migration_call + migrate-pinned-task fallback, Wake-Q batched wake, PSI Pressure-Stall-Info hooks. 14 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + rq-lock-deadlock + pick-next-no-starvation + cpus_ptr-respected) / Layer-2 ref to runqueue_select.tla + __schedule.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus per-task time-tracking equivalence.
- drivers/gpu/drm/scheduler.md: covers drivers/gpu/drm/scheduler/sched_{main,entity,fence}.c — drm_sched generic GPU job scheduler (consumed by amdgpu/etnaviv/lima/msm/panfrost/panthor/v3d): per-engine drm_gpu_scheduler with N priority levels (KERNEL/HIGH/NORMAL/LOW), per-context drm_sched_entity FIFO job queue, per-job dependency-fence chain (run_job invoked when all deps signal), per-job scheduled-fence + finished-fence pair (scheduled when picked, finished when HW fence signals), kthread-per-scheduler main loop with priority-round-robin entity selection, per-job timeout + karma per-context-fault tracking + entity guilty-flag, GPU-reset support via stop_sched + resubmit_jobs + start_sched, per-driver backend_ops (prepare_job/run_job/timedout_job/free_job). 12 REQ / 6 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (job-UAF + entity-UAF + dep-cycle-termination + hw-rq-overflow) / Layer-2 ref to sched_fence_chain.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus liveness proof.

Total state: 260 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 26 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access + intel-iommu + nvme-host-pci + drm-gem-core + usb-core-urb + sched-core + drm-scheduler.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-sched-core, design-drivers-gpu-drm-scheduler.

Next iter plan: kernel/locking/mutex.md (mutex + ww_mutex foundation) + drivers/iommu/iova.md (IOVA allocator foundation for dma-iommu).
